sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50103" key="i(ero/stolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερό-στολος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, an Egyptian priest <sense id="n50103.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who had charge of the sacred vestments</tr_>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στολιστής</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.352b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
